creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
Hi,

> checking for gtk-config... /usr/X11R6/bin/gtk11d-config
> checking for GTK - version >= 1.1.13... no

I just tried to make this on my machine and it worked:

checking for gtk-config... /usr/X11R6/bin/gtk11d-config
checking for GTK - version >= 1.1.13... yes

I have gtk-1.1.13 installed here.  

Brett
